subcodes.first_line: O dear one! True glory, in its primal reality, belongeth unto those souls who are exalted through the glory of God, for no glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز عزت در حقیقت اولیه مخصوص نفوسی است که بعز الله معززند چه که عزت هیچ
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
